title: project-instinct/deep-whole-body-parkour
abstract: # Deep Whole-body Parkour This is the repository that contains source code for the [Deep Whole-body Parkour website](https://project-instinct.github.io/deep-whole-body-parkour/). Deep Whole-body Parkour presents research on neural whole-body control for dynamic parkour behaviors in legged robots. This work develops learning-based approaches for enabling robots to perform complex, acrobatic maneuvers that require coordinated control of the entire body. ## Key Contributions - **Neural Whole-body Control**: End-to-end learning of policies for whole-body coordination during dynamic tasks - **Parkour Skill Learning**: Training robots to perform complex parkour maneuvers through deep reinforcement learning - **Real-world Deployment**: Transfer of learned skills to physical robotic platforms ## Related Research This work is part of the broader [Project Instinct](https://project-instinct.github.io/) initiative exploring instinct-level intelligences for robotics. ## Citation If you find this work useful for your research, please cite our paper: ## Website License This work is licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0 International License .
abstract_zh: Deep Whole-body Parkour 提出了用于腿式机器人动态跑酷行为的神经全身控制方法。本研究开发了基于学习的方法，使机器人能够执行需要全身协调控制的复杂、杂技般的动作。主要贡献包括：神经全身控制——用于动态任务中全身协调策略的端到端学习；跑酷技能学习——通过深度强化学习训练机器人执行复杂跑酷动作；以及真实世界部署——将学到的技能迁移到物理机器人平台。
tldr_zh: 用深度强化学习让机器人学会全身协调的跑酷动作。
cover_zh: 机器人也能跑酷？全身协调的神经控制让四足机器人完成高难度杂技动作！

judge.reason: 官方仓库，全身控制+跑酷技能学习，有真实部署，方向吻合
